releaseNotes:
feat(stock): unknown code offers scan-to-create product (#9)

* feat(stock): unknown code offers scan-to-create product

Stock lookup dead-ended on 'Product not found' with no way forward. Now a 404 shows '+ Create product "CODE"' which jumps to Products with the create dialog open and the part number prefilled; after creating, lookup works. Other lookup failures (network/session) are no longer mislabeled as product-not-found.

* feat(stock): product-first flow — select/search, then batch-scan serials

Reworked per Hans: pick the product FIRST (search list, or scan any product label to select it), choose stock in/out, then rapid-scan serials — every accepted scan books one movement immediately through the offline outbox, duplicates within the session are flagged and ignored. Bulk products take a quantity; scanning their own label bumps it +1. Delivery use case: select 'E4BL tag', stock-in mode, scan-scan-scan the new serials.

Adjust stays on the session screen; recent outbox list unchanged; unknown code still offers scan-to-create.

* test(stock): FakeApi implements the new products() endpoint
